And to exempt challenges to seniority systems from the limitations period would be absolutely irreconcilable with the purposes of 703(h) —— 703 (h) was part of the Mansfi e Id-DIrksen compromise. It was the quid pro quo for the inclusion of Title VII In the '64 Civil Rights Act. The whole reason for 703(h) Is that Congress recognized that seniority is of critical impo.tance in collective bargaining* anu it's of critical importance to workers.
